title: Node comment and game teaching note editing implementation

verified_baseline.worktree_and_index: clean before implementation; no untracked files

defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-005: WorkspaceRightPanel exposed current-node comments as read-only text with no deterministic edit, save, cancel, or node-switch lifecycle.
defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-006: No game-level teaching-note identity, memory owner, isolation rule, or editor existed.
defects_reproduced.MISSING-UI-007: No typed teaching save owner retained failed/stale content with recoverable status and truthful retry eligibility.

implementation.surface: WS-005 unified workspace right-panel comments tab
implementation.draft_owner: one typed teaching draft inside the existing PGN Store
implementation.presentation: project-owned ProductField, ProductButton, ProductStateBanner, tabs, and confirmation overlay

node_comment_contract.identity: active source session + source ID + canonical game ID + selected node ID
node_comment_contract.draft_mutation: text changes affect only the teaching draft
node_comment_contract.save_mutation: clone the existing annotation, replace only plainComments, then serialize through the existing annotation serializer
node_comment_contract.dirty_transition: changed successful save increments the existing local source revision once; unchanged save does not

game_teaching_note_contract.identity: active source session + allocated canonical game ID
game_teaching_note_contract.separation: not a node comment, annotation, PGN header, lesson, session, or collection
game_teaching_note_contract.draft_mutation: text changes affect only the teaching draft
game_teaching_note_contract.save_mutation: updates only the in-memory note map entry for the active game
game_teaching_note_contract.isolation: switching games resolves a different game identity; each game retains only its own session note
game_teaching_note_contract.dirty_transition: changed successful save increments the existing local source revision once

draft_and_canonical_dirty_transitions.event: stale, readonly, unavailable, or rejected save

node_game_source_switching.clean_draft: target node or game is selected immediately after the clean draft closes
node_game_source_switching.dirty_draft_cancel: original draft, source, game, node, canonical content, dirty state, and invoking-action focus remain intact
node_game_source_switching.dirty_draft_confirm: an immutable validated game/node target is checked before synchronous draft discard and exact selection
node_game_source_switching.stale_confirmation: workspace identity includes source, revisions, selected game/node, and draft identity so changed context cannot reuse a confirmed action
node_game_source_switching.source_replacement: existing source/local-copy replacement coordinator includes the teaching draft in unsaved workspace state
node_game_source_switching.route_and_teardown: route leave and workspace teardown discard teaching drafts only after existing safe-first confirmation succeeds

save_cancel_and_failure_behavior.save: explicit only; successful or unchanged save announces approved Chinese status and returns focus to the editor field
save_cancel_and_failure_behavior.cancel: clean closes immediately; dirty uses the existing coordinator and returns focus to the exact edit trigger after discard
save_cancel_and_failure_behavior.retryable: only a newer source revision with unchanged canonical target content offers 重试保存; retry refreshes the canonical revision once before mutation
save_cancel_and_failure_behavior.nonretryable: different context or changed canonical target retains full draft, shows approved Chinese reopen guidance, and does not offer a futile retry
save_cancel_and_failure_behavior.readonly: retains draft if mutability is revoked before save and performs no mutation
save_cancel_and_failure_behavior.exceptions: no raw exception, Store name, internal ID/hash, worker term, HTTP text, or transport detail is surfaced

readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.readonly_existing_comments: comment display is allowed when a real source exists
readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.readonly_editing: edit controls, save actions, game-note creation, draft creation, and dirty transitions are absent
readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.local_copy: edit controls appear only after an approved real local editable source identity exists
readonly_and_contract_blocked_behavior.contract_blocked: truthful unavailable state remains request-free and exposes no comments editor or synthetic content

destructive_coordinator_integration.reentrancy: existing in-flight lock prevents stacked confirmations and duplicate execution
destructive_coordinator_integration.exact_target: captured game/node target is validated before discard and applied once

accessibility_and_focus.labels: node and whole-game scope headings, explicit field labels, and descriptions do not depend on placeholders
accessibility_and_focus.keyboard: project overlays preserve focus trap, safe initial action, Escape cancellation, and invoking-action restoration
accessibility_and_focus.editor_open: focus moves into the relevant multiline field
accessibility_and_focus.save: focus returns to the current editor field while status is announced
accessibility_and_focus.cancel: focus returns to the exact edit trigger
accessibility_and_focus.status: errors are associated with the field and exposed as alerts; success uses a polite live region
accessibility_and_focus.scroll: the existing right-tab panel remains the single scroll owner

browser_validation.input: temporary two-game PGN with existing comments, NAG, variation, arrow, system/user text, and unknown annotation field
browser_validation.node_display: existing node comments and NAG/variation indicators rendered; switching to an annotated node showed the intended canonical comment
browser_validation.node_save: changed plain comment updated only the intended node, marked the local source dirty, and preserved system/user text, graphical annotation count, variation, NAG, headers, and other games
browser_validation.unchanged_save: reported no change, did not mark the source dirty, and returned focus to the textarea
browser_validation.node_cancel_and_switch: dirty next-node cancellation preserved exact draft and selection; confirmation discarded only the draft and selected the captured target once
browser_validation.game_notes: saved note remained isolated to game 1, game 2 initially had no note, returning to game 1 restored its memory note, and dirty game-switch cancellation/confirmation preserved/discarded as specified
browser_validation.stale_save: a real local insert changed the source revision while a game-note draft was dirty; first save retained the complete draft and offered retry, retry succeeded because canonical note text was unchanged
browser_validation.source_replacement: dirty teaching draft produced one source-replacement confirmation; cancellation retained source and exact draft
browser_validation.route_leave: dirty route leave produced one safe-first confirmation; Escape retained URL and draft and restored exact link focus
browser_validation.history: real SPA history Back established a forward entry; a dirty draft then blocked real history Forward with one alertdialog, and Escape restored the workspace URL and complete draft
browser_validation.beforeunload: a dirty draft registered the native beforeunload protection and a direct browser history leave surfaced the native warning path
browser_validation.focus_trap: initial safe action, Tab/Shift+Tab containment, Escape, exact invoking-action return, editor-open field focus, save field focus, and cancel trigger focus passed
browser_validation.duplicate_attempts: one alertdialog existed while guarded; the existing coordinator in-flight lock prevented duplicate actions
browser_validation.readonly: permission projection statically permits existing comment display but removes editor/save/draft capability for real readonly sources; no fake remote source was introduced to force a browser state
browser_validation.contract_blocked: /match/dev-slice-006 rendered the truthful unavailable state with no editor and no API request
browser_validation.responsive: desktop composition and 800x700 narrow sheet composition rendered one visible teaching textarea and preserved the existing single scroll owner
browser_validation.themes: light and dark settings were exercised; dark narrow editing retained one visible focused field
browser_validation.runtime_health: nonblank workspace DOM, no Vite error overlay, and no breaking application console error; only the existing non-breaking favicon.ico 404 appeared in one browser session
browser_validation.artifacts: all temporary PGN, browser snapshots, console files, and build outputs were deleted; no browser artifact remains in the repository

cor_impact.MISSING-UI-005: implemented for local editable canonical PGN nodes
cor_impact.MISSING-UI-006: implemented as source-session memory-only game teaching notes
cor_impact.MISSING-UI-007: implemented for local unchanged, stale, readonly, retryable, nonretryable, cancel, and retained-draft lifecycles
cor_impact.COR-019: only the contract-independent memory-editing portion is implemented; authority-wide closure is not claimed

od_boundaries.OD-01: no lesson, teaching session, collection hierarchy, cross-source ownership, or persistence owner was selected
od_boundaries.OD-02: no autosave, reload recovery, retention duration, local database, export, or synchronization contract was selected
od_boundaries.OD-03_to_OD-11: remain open and unchanged; no provisional value was promoted to authority

limitations: No confirmed remote contract was fabricated to create an editable readonly-copy browser scenario; readonly comment visibility/edit suppression is covered by the real permission projection and contract-blocked browser route.
The browser-native beforeunload prompt copy and button rendering remain browser-controlled; the warning path was observed without asserting browser-owned text.

A stale retry was exercised through a real local source revision change where canonical note text remained unchanged; nonretryable canonical-content conflict behavior was validated through the typed mutation branch and review rather than an artificial competing writer.
deferred_persistence_and_lesson_work: versioned teaching persistence and reload recovery
teaching-note export format and cross-source migration

addressed: confirmation identity now includes selected game/node and exact target navigation is validated before discard
retry appears only for a revision-only stale state whose canonical target still matches the baseline
successful and unchanged save explicitly return focus to the editing field
browser artifacts removed before aggregate validation

commit_subject: feat(teaching): 完成本地节点批注与对局教学笔记编辑
